user.title: Add a SmartMat
user.description: Pick the weight sensor of one SmartMat Lite (e.g. sensor.smartmat_w32190800328_weight). {hint}

error.not_a_smartmat: That entity is not a sensor.smartmat_*_weight sensor.

init.title: SmartMat Dashboard
init.description: No options — edit product / tare / full via the entity cards.
